content.full_text:
California
Fair POlitical
Practices Cornmission
August 15, 19 90
Gary M. Baum
Deputy city Attorney
city of Garden crove
P. O. Box 3070
Garden Grove, CA 92642
Re:
Your Request for Advice
Our FiIe No. I-9 0-4 6 8
Dear Mr. Baum:
You have requested advice on behalf of Bart Blakesley, a
planning commi,ssioner for the city of Garden crove and candidate
for city council, reqarding his possible obligations under the
conflict-of-j-nterest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the
rrAct) .1 Because you have not asked for advice about a specific
pending decision, we are treating your request as one for informal
assistance. z
OUESTION
What conflict-of-interest 
standards of the Act apply to a
city counciL member who received a campaign contribution in excess
of $250 during his canpaigTn for city counciL and while he lras
serving as a planning -ommissioner? will the standards of Section
84308 apply?
CONCLUSION
Generally, the provisions set forth at Sections 87100 et seq'
of the Act appIy.
1 Go.r".r,."nt Code Sections 81ooo-91015- A11 statutory references
are to the Government code unless otherwise indicated. 
commission
iegufations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations. Section
ie5oo, et seg.- A11 references to regulations are to Title 2,
Division 6 oi the california code of Regulations'
2 
Irrfo.raL assistance does not provide the requestor with the
inrnunity provided by an opinion or forrnal written advice'
1e o.r"..,io"t t code seation e:rr+; 2 cal. code of Regs' section
18329 (c) (3) , coPY enclosed. )
428 J Street, Suite 8OO . P.O. Box 8O? . sacramento cA 958O4-O8O7 . (916)322'5660


Our Fi■e No.
Page 2
エー90-468
FACTS
!,!r. Blakesley is currently a planning commissioner in the
city of Garden crove.3 He has recently filed as a candidate for
city council. Mr. Blakes1ey may receive a campaign contribution
of more than $25o fron a party three or uore months after a final
decision is rendered by the Planning commission in a proceeding
involving the party. If Mr. Blakesley is elected to the city
council, he will not serve as a planning coromissioner.
ANALYSIS
City council members who are directly elected by the voters
are exenpt ffon the provisions of Section 84308. Section
84308(a) (3).' 
rf Mr. Blakesly will be directly elected by the
voters, he witl be exempt fron section 84308.
Mr. Blakes1y will however remain subject to the conflict-of-
interest provisions that apply to public officials in general.
Those provisions are set forth at Section 87100 et seq. Section
87100 states:
No public official 
at any level of state or 1ocaI
government shall nake, participate in urakinq or in any
way attenpt to use his official position to influence a
governmental decision in which he knows or has reason to
know he has a financial interest.
Thus the Act examines the rrfinancial interest'r of the public
official 
in determining a conflict of interest. 
"Financial
interestrr is defined by section 87103. while I'financial interestrl
includes any source of income (Section 87103 (c) ), canpaign
contributions are expressly excluded fron the definition of
income. (see Section 82030(b) (1).) 
In the hlrpothetical posed by
your letter, the $250 campaign contribution would not cause a
Lonflict of interest for !lr. Blakesley in a later governmental
decision by the citY council.
3 
Thit advice letter is based on the facts presented in your
tetter of July 11, 1990, and our telephone conversation of JuIy
25, 1990.
4 rhis exernption does not apply when a city councilmember is
sitting as a nember of a noneienpt body such as a planning
."..i.!i"" 
or joint powers agenc!. Id.. Thus if Mr' Blakesrey is
elected to the city Louncil and appointed to a joint powers
ig.rr"y, the provisions of Section 84308 would apply to his
aitivities as a member of the joint powers agency '


・      Our Fi■
e No.  I-90-468
Page 3
I trust that this letter has provided you with the guidance
reguested. If you have any further questions regarding this mat-
ter, please contact ne at (916) 322-59oL.
Sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
Acting General counsel
-'/J-fu*
By: uark uorodoni
Counsel, Legal Division
SH:l,EI:dg
